label: gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview
descriptiveGuide: Focus on maintaining a conversational pace throughout this 25-minute easy run. Keep your breathing relaxed and your stride short — if you can't hold a conversation, slow down. This builds your aerobic base without stressing your joints.
